item.title: Paper accepted at ISSTA 2026 (main research track)
item.description: Our paper has been accepted at ISSTA 2026, the ACM SIGSOFT International Symposium on Software Testing and Analysis, in the main research track.

item.title: General Co-Chair of ICST 2027
item.description: I am honored to serve as General Co-Chair of ICST 2027, the IEEE International Conference on Software Testing, Verification and Validation. More information: conf.researchr.org/home/icst-2027.

item.title: Paper accepted at QRS 2026 (main track)
item.description: Our paper has been accepted at QRS 2026, the IEEE International Conference on Software Quality, Reliability, and Security, in the main track.

item.title: Paper accepted at FSE 2026 (AI-Aware Competition/Challenge track)
item.description: Our paper has been accepted at FSE 2026, the ACM International Conference on the Foundations of Software Engineering, in the AI-Aware Competition/Challenge track.

item.title: Papers accepted at ICST 2026 (main and tool demo tracks)
item.description: Our papers have been accepted at ICST 2026, the IEEE International Conference on Software Testing, Verification and Validation, in the main research track and the tool demo track.

item.title: Paper accepted at IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV) 2026
item.description: Our paper has been accepted at the IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV) 2026.
